mapper.select:
SELECT
user_id as userId, user_name_ko as userNameKo, user_name_en as userNameEn, user_password as userPassword, user_email as userEmail, user_phone as userPhone, user_cellphone as userCellphone, user_zipno as userZipno, user_address as userAddress, user_address_2 as userAddress2, DATE_FORMAT(date_created, '%Y-%m-%d') as dateCreated, user_id_created as userIdCreated, DATE_FORMAT(date_modified, '%Y-%m-%d') as dateModified, user_id_modified as userIdModified, DATE_FORMAT(date_deleted, '%Y-%m-%d') as dateDeleted, user_id_deleted as userIdDeleted
FROM user
ORDER BY date_created desc
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user ( user_id, user_name_ko, user_name_en, user_password, user_email, user_phone, user_cellphone, user_zipno, user_address, user_address_2, user_id_created ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{userNameKo}, #{userNameEn}, #{userPassword}, #{userEmail}, #{userPhone}, #{userCellphone}, #{userZipno}, #{userAddress}, #{userAddress2}, #{userIdCreated} )
